description: Evaluation cases for the echo-frontend-inspector skill.

cases.name: Core flow inspection — RadarScreen + CameraJobScreen
cases.prompt: Inspect the RadarScreen and CameraJobScreen for UI/UX issues. Focus on map markers, the shutter button guard, and the back-press unlock pattern.
expected_findings: tracksViewChanges check applied to both screens
Shutter disabled-state check reported
beforeRemove / unlock_request pattern verified on CameraJobScreen
latitudeDelta zoom level checked on RadarScreen
must_not_report: False positive on Alert.alert confirmation dialogs

cases.name: Form validation — CreateRequestSheet + AuthScreen
cases.prompt: Inspect CreateRequestSheet and AuthScreen for form validation, keyboard handling, and missing loading states.
expected_findings: keyboardShouldPersistTaps check on ScrollView
KeyboardAvoidingView presence verified
Submit button loading state checked
Required field validation verified (location required, email required)

cases.name: Visual consistency — full src/ sweep
cases.prompt: Run a full visual consistency check across all screens. Report hardcoded hex colours, missing SafeAreaView, and any debug text visible in JSX.
expected_findings: Hardcoded hex colours flagged
SafeAreaView presence checked on all screens
Placeholder/TODO text scanned and reported if found
Theme constant usage verified
must_not_report: AlignmentMiniMap local color palette — this is a named constant object, not a hardcoded value in a style

cases.name: Android bridge safety — coordinates and dimensions
cases.prompt: Check every screen for coordinates or dimensions passed to native components without parseFloat(). Flag any Number() usage on bridge props.
expected_findings: All latitude/longitude props inspected
parseFloat() wrapping verified
Number() anti-pattern flagged if found
must_not_report: Literal number values like latitude={38.7} — these are already correct

cases.name: PhotoViewerScreen — ephemeral security check
cases.prompt: Inspect PhotoViewerScreen for screenshot blocking, the 3-minute timer, and the view session start flow.
expected_findings: ScreenCapture.preventScreenCaptureAsync() in useEffect verified
Cleanup ScreenCapture.allowScreenCaptureAsync() in useEffect return verified
startSession() called on mount for supabasePhotoId
Timer initialised from backend expiry (not hardcoded 180s)
Expired state handled (already_expired flag)

cases.name: Admin panel role guard
cases.prompt: Check all admin screens to verify they are role-gated. Report any admin screen that can be accessed without an admin role check.
expected_findings: Each admin screen checks profile.role or isAdmin before rendering content
Admin-only navigation items in ProfileScreen are conditionally rendered

cases.name: Empty states and error handling
cases.prompt: Check ActivityScreen, RadarScreen, and all admin list screens for empty state messages and network error handling.
expected_findings: Empty state UI present when job list is empty
Empty state UI present when activity list is empty
RPC error caught and shown to user (toast or inline message) — not swallowed
